full_text:
Han Xi ťüďśôě
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Xi (ťüďśôě)was born in Nanyang. Sent as reinforcements to Huang Zu, he was defeated and killed by Sun Ce. Han Xi was affiliated with Liu Biao. Han Xi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
